side_effects.description: Lipohypertrophy at injection site on left side of belly fat, visibly bulging and asymmetrical compared to right side; plunger resistance during injection likely due to scar tissue buildup

protocol_notes: Third cycle of IGF-LR3. Uses 3 month on / 3 month off cycle structure. Administers subcutaneously into belly fat. Has been running multiple peptides in the same belly fat injection sites for a couple of years without adequate site rotation. OP ultimately concluded the bulging was lipohypertrophy from repeated pinning in the same area, not organ growth.
